title: monotagma humile
intro: Monotagma humile, a type of herbaceous plant, is a species in the family Marantaceae, commonly known as the arrowroot family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Monotagma humile include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Monotagma humile include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to apply topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
